name: CrowdStrike Falcon
description: Monitor CrowdStrike Falcon endpoint security platform for device protection and threat detection compliance

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to Falcon Console at https://falcon.crowdstrike.com
2. Go to Support & Resources → API Clients and Keys
3. Click Add new API client
4. Enable scopes: Hosts (Read), User Management (Read), Prevention Policies (Read), Spotlight Vulnerabilities (Read)
5. Copy the Client ID and Secret

credentialFields.label: Client ID
credentialFields.helpText: Found in Falcon Console → Support → API Clients and Keys → Add new API client

credentialFields.label: Client Secret
credentialFields.helpText: Generated when creating an API client in Falcon Console

checks.name: Secure Devices
checks.description: Verifies CrowdStrike Falcon agent is deployed and protecting endpoints

checks.name: Employee Access
checks.description: Reviews CrowdStrike Falcon users with access to the endpoint security platform

checks.name: Prevention Policy Enforcement
checks.description: Verifies that CrowdStrike Falcon prevention policies are configured and enabled

checks.name: Vulnerability Management
checks.description: Monitors CrowdStrike Spotlight for open vulnerabilities across managed endpoints

checks.name: Sensor Coverage
checks.description: Assesses CrowdStrike Falcon sensor deployment coverage and health across endpoints
